Class AimSystem

java.lang.Object
com.hypixel.hytale.component.system.System
com.hypixel.hytale.component.system.tick.TickingSystem
com.hypixel.hytale.component.system.tick.ArchetypeTickingSystem
com.hypixel.hytale.component.system.tick.EntityTickingSystem
lucis.lux.hff.systems.AimSystem
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.hypixel.hytale.component.system.ISystem, com.hypixel.hytale.component.system.QuerySystem, com.hypixel.hytale.component.system.tick.TickableSystem
public class AimSystem extends com.hypixel.hytale.component.system.tick.EntityTickingSystem
The AimSystem class is an EntityTickingSystem responsible for managing the aiming mechanics of entities that have an AimComponent. This system adjusts the camera settings and other visual effects when a player aims down the sights of a firearm.

This system performs the following tasks during each tick:

  • Checks if the entity is currently aiming using the AimComponent.
  • Adjusts the camera settings to provide a first-person perspective when aiming.
  • Resets the camera settings to default when the player stops aiming.
  • Applies additional visual effects, such as reticles or vignettes, to enhance the aiming experience.

This system is part of the Entity Component System (ECS) architecture in Hytale and is registered during plugin initialization. It only ticks entities that have an AimComponent.

This system is typically used in conjunction with the AimComponent and is triggered by interactions such as ToggleAimInteraction.

See Also:
  • EntityTickingSystem
  • AimComponent
  • PlayerRef
  • ServerCameraSettings

  • Constructor Details

    • AimSystem

      public AimSystem(com.hypixel.hytale.component.ComponentType<com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.universe.world.storage.EntityStore, AimComponent> aimComponentType)
      Constructs a new AimSystem with the specified component type for aiming.
      Parameters:
      aimComponentType - The component type for the AimComponent.

  • Method Details

    • tick

      public void tick(float v, int i, @NonNullDecl com.hypixel.hytale.component.ArchetypeChunk archetypeChunk, @NonNullDecl com.hypixel.hytale.component.Store store, @NonNullDecl com.hypixel.hytale.component.CommandBuffer commandBuffer)
      Ticks the system, updating the camera settings for all entities with an AimComponent. This method is called at regular intervals and adjusts the camera settings based on whether the entity is currently aiming.

      The following adjustments are made when aiming:

      • The camera is set to first-person view.
      • The movement speed is reduced to simulate the slower movement while aiming.
      • The camera position and rotation are smoothly interpolated for a natural feel.
      • Additional visual effects, such as reticles or vignettes, can be added here.
      Specified by:
      tick in class com.hypixel.hytale.component.system.tick.EntityTickingSystem
      Parameters:
      v - The time delta since the last tick.
      i - The index of the entity in the archetype chunk.
      archetypeChunk - The archetype chunk containing all the entities.
      store - The entity store.
      commandBuffer - The command buffer applying changes to entities.

    • getQuery

      @NullableDecl public com.hypixel.hytale.component.query.Query getQuery()
      Defines the query for this system, specifying that it should process entities that have an AimComponent.
      Returns:
      A query that matches entities with the AimComponent.
